title: Fix a channel that calls allow after its first Repo query
prompt: Write a Phoenix channel at `lib/my_app_web/channels/game_channel.ex` that handles `join("game:" <> game_id, _params, socket)`. The allow call MUST occur BEFORE the `Games.get_game!(game_id)` call — place the allow line as the first line of the join body, then the Repo query.
tier_rationale: Ordering — the allow call must precede any Repo access.
